note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

citation_no.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

defendant.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

address_ofappellantor_attorney_1.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

address_ofappellantor_attorney_2.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

address_ofappellantor_attorney_3.guidance: A US state — 'Maine' or the 2-letter 'ME'; match the box width.

bar_number.guidance: An attorney's Maine bar registration number.
